name: textarea
title: Textarea
description: A multi-line text input wrapping Perry's TextArea with consistent styling.

docs.overview: Textarea wraps Perry's TextArea with consistent border, radius, and padding styling. Supports an error variant with destructive border color, similar to Input.
docs.usage: Textarea({ placeholder: 'Enter description...', rows: 4, onChange: (v) => desc.set(v) })
docs.accessibility: Uses role 'input'. Pair with Label for accessible form fields. Provide accessibilityLabel for screen readers.

platformNotes.linux: Uses native GTK TextView through Perry.
platformNotes.windows: Uses current Perry Windows backend behavior.
platformNotes.web: Rendered as styled textarea element through Perry web target.

props.name: error
props.description: Show error state with destructive border color

examples.name: with-label
examples.title: Textarea with Label
examples.code:
VStack(4, [
  Label({ children: 'Bio' }),
  Textarea({ placeholder: 'Tell us about yourself...', rows: 4 }),
])

examples.name: disabled
examples.title: Disabled Textarea
examples.code: Textarea({ placeholder: 'Read-only content', disabled: true, rows: 5 })

agent.summary: Multi-line text input for longer-form content like descriptions, comments, and messages
useWhen: Any text exceeding a single line
doNotUseWhen: Rich text editing (use a rich text editor component)
Code editing (use a code editor component)
layoutHints: Use rows prop to control visible height
accessibilityChecklist: Pair with Label for visible label
Provide accessibilityLabel when no visible label
